mapper.update: update t_waybill set settle_type = #{form.settleType}, settle_mode = #{form.settleMode}, transport_mode = #{form.transportMode}, vehicle_id = #{form.vehicleId}, driver_id = #{form.driverId}, fleet_id = #{form.fleetId}, contract_amount = #{form.contractAmount}, remark = #{form.remark}, business_date = #{form.businessDate}, load_time = #{form.loadTime} where waybill_id = #{form.waybillId}
mapper.select: select w.*, o.order_no, o.shipper_order_number, o.remark orderRemark, o.business_type_code, o.container_business_type_id, o.container_location, o.placing_location, o.unloading_location, o.return_container_location, o.tax_point, o.cabinet_id, o.create_user_id orderCreateUserId, o.create_user_name orderCreateUserName, o.schedule_id, o.manager_id as orderManagerId, o.latest_packing_time
select COUNT(1)

select w.*, o.order_no, o.remark orderRemark, o.container_business_type_id, o.container_location, o.placing_location, o.unloading_location, o.return_container_location, o.tax_point, o.cabinet_id, o.manager_id as orderManagerId, o.create_user_id orderCreateUserId, o.create_user_name orderCreateUserName from t_waybill w left join t_order o on w.order_id = o.order_id where w.waybill_id in
#{item}

select w.*, o.order_no, o.remark orderRemark, o.business_type_code, o.container_business_type_id, o.container_location, o.placing_location, o.unloading_location, o.return_container_location, o.tax_point, o.cabinet_id, o.manager_id as orderManagerId, o.create_user_id orderCreateUserId, o.create_user_name orderCreateUserName from t_waybill w left join t_order o on w.order_id = o.order_id where w.waybill_id = #{waybillId}

select sum(receive_amount) from t_waybill where waybill_status != #{excludeStatus} and waybill_id in
#{item}
select *from t_waybill where order_id = #{orderId} AND waybill_status != #{excludeStatus}

select IFNULL(SUM(w.payable_amount),0) payableAmount, IFNULL(SUM(w.salary_amount),0) salaryAmount, IFNULL(SUM(w.car_cost_amount),0) carCostAmount, IFNULL(SUM(w.receive_amount),0) receiveAmount, IFNULL(SUM(w.profit_amount),0) profitAmount

SELECT waybill_id, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y%m%d') AS `date`, payable_amount AS receiveAmount, driver_id, vehicle_id, route_name AS summary, shipper_id FROM t_waybill WHERE waybill_id IN
#{id}

SELECT w.shipper_id, w.enterprise_id, COUNT(1) waybillCount, SUM(w.receive_amount) receiveAmount, SUM(w.payable_amount) payableAmount, SUM(w.salary_amount) salaryAmount, SUM(w.car_cost_amount) carCostAmount, SUM(w.profit_amount) profitAmount, ROUND(SUM(w.receive_amount / (100 + w.tax_point) * w.tax_point),2) taxAmount
GROUP BY w.shipper_id, w.enterprise_id
SELECT waybill_id
select waybill_id from t_waybill where waybill_number = #{waybillNumber}
select count(1) from t_waybill where enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and waybill_status != #{excludeStatus}
